description: Clean the home inventory data collected after the fire scare. Standardize categories, normalize dates, calculate depreciation, flag items needing documentation, and apply consistent formatting to the inventory records.

natural_language.prompt: You have messy home inventory data from someone who frantically documented their belongings after a fire scare. Clean the data by: 1) Standardizing inconsistent category names (Electronics/electronic/ELECTRONICS → Electronics), 2) Converting various date formats to standard format, 3) Calculating item age and depreciated current values using category-specific rates (Electronics 20%/year, Furniture 10%/year, etc.), 4) Flagging high-value items (>$1000) that need photos, 5) Adding conditional formatting to highlight important items, and 6) Creating summary statistics by category.
